narrative:
Montville TWP township has 10,059 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.4 percentage points.
